title: Stand-up comic held for jokes about Erdoğan and Islam in Turkey crackdown
summary_full: Deniz Göktaş is regarded as one of Turkey's most popular comedians and is accused of "inciting hatred and hostility" on stage.
summary_public: Deniz Göktaş is regarded as one of Turkey's most popular comedians and is accused of "inciting hatred and hostility" on stage.
